pull_requests.title: chore(ci): make release-pipeline autodoc step best-effort
pull_requests.author: letterle-at-pieces
pull_requests.summary: Adds continue-on-error to the autodoc generation step in the release pipeline to prevent gemini-cli failures from blocking the entire release.

pull_requests.title: chore(ci): disable autodoc until tooling fixes land
pull_requests.author: letterle-at-pieces
pull_requests.summary: Temporarily disables the autodoc feature in CI configuration to unblock the release pipeline until upstream tooling bugs are fixed.

pull_requests.title: chore(autodoc): advance core module hash to unblock docs-freshness
pull_requests.author: letterle-at-pieces
pull_requests.summary: Advances the stored source hash for the core module to resolve failing docs-freshness checks caused by recent code changes.

pull_requests.title: Fix: defaultLibraryDirectory for MacOS should now point to the correct location
pull_requests.author: robert-at-pieces
pull_requests.summary: Fixes the default library directory resolution on macOS. The localDebugMode logic was removed but the parameter is kept for backward compatibility.

pull_requests.title: Hotfix: fix flutter assets resolution
pull_requests.author: robert-at-pieces
pull_requests.summary: Hotfix to correct the resolution path for flutter assets on macOS.
